content.en:
"The light-clothed saint left?"

Ye Tian found that the light-clothed saintess was gone, either she was removed by the Ancestor Holy Mountain, or she left on her own initiative.

"It's time for me to leave, I can't last long anyway, and if I continue to stay here to meditate, I won't gain much!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he flew out of the Ancestral Sacred Mountain.

It is difficult to enter the Ancestral Sacred Mountain, but it is very easy to fly out of the Ancestral Sacred Mountain, and there is no barrier.

In an instant, Ye Tian came to the outside of the Ancestor Holy Mountain.

At this time, he sensed the battle in the distance.

Eight Saints are besieging and killing the Light-Clad Saintess.

At this time, the light-clothed saintess was completely at a disadvantage.

Among them, the Black Pupil Holy Son was also in the ranks of the siege, which brought great pressure to the light-clothed Holy Maiden.

After all, the Black Pupil Holy Son also has two holy endowments, and his strength will definitely not be much weaker than that of the lightly clothed Holy Maiden.

In addition, the other seven saints, all of them have holy relics, and their strength is naturally not weak.

In the face of these eight saints, the light-clothed saintess couldn't beat them at all.

However, the light-clothed saintess also have holy relics, which are a cyan armor and a sword, these two holy relics make her strength very strong, but the use of holy relics to fight consumes a lot, and if it takes a long time, the strength is exhausted, and she will definitely die.

But if you don't use the holy relics to fight, it will be even more dangerous.

The blessing of the holy relic to strength is too great, otherwise the value of the holy relic would not be so high.

Ye Tian came out of the Ancestor Sacred Mountain, which naturally attracted the attention of the Light-clothed Saintess and the eight Saints.

Ye Tian didn't think about anything, and rushed over directly.

He decided to help the lightly clothed saint!

In fact, even if he didn't help the Light-clothed Holy Maiden, those Holy Gifters of the Dark Destruction Domain would definitely not let him go.

Seeing Ye Tian rushing over, the three Holy Endowments came to kill as soon as possible and intercepted Ye Tian.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian didn't leave his hand, and directly cast the amplification holy skill of the imperial body, and then cast the perfection-level holy skill-Golden Silk!

At the same time, the Perfection-level Eternal Immortal Holy Body was also urged with all its might, and the power of the Extreme Dao was also blessed on his body.

Burst!!!!

The Golden Silk Saint struck a Saint Gift.

Rumble!!!!

The Holy Endowment was directly hit hard and flew out upside down, and the holy objects on his body were a little darker.

"How could it be !!!"

The other Saints were stunned.

Ye Tian hit one of them with a single blow, what kind of strength is this?

With the Holy Endowment Talisman, as well as many secret treasures and life-saving things, even so, he was still hit hard by a blow, and the difference in strength is very large.

"It's not good, his holy body is very powerful, and he also has amplification type holy skills, and he has a consummation-level holy skill, and his strength is even stronger than that female saint endowment!"

One of the Saints was shocked.

Ye Tian's strength shocked these saints, but the light-clothed saint maiden was not surprised.

It was normal for Ye Tian to be able to cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the Consummation Realm, and this time he entered the Holy Gold Realm again, comprehended the Golden Ancestor Tablet, and cultivated the Golden Silk Holy Technique to the Consummation Realm, which was not a very strange thing.

Therefore, Ye Tian's strength will skyrocket so much.

I have to admit that the light-clothed saintess also knows that Ye Tian's strength is much stronger than herself.

----------------

"Didn't kill it!"

Ye Tian had no accident, if the other party did not have a secret treasure and holy object protection, he could kill the other party in one blow, but the other party also had a holy relic, unless he used the holy artifact forbidden yuan blade, he could kill the other party.

However, unless he had to, he would not use the Holy Relic Forbidden Yuan Blade.

Three Saint Grants besieged Ye Tian, one of them had already been severely damaged, and only two remained.

At this time, Ye Tian performed another Perfection Realm Holy Technique—Void Slash!

This move was Ye Tian's strongest move, and if it was used against the Saint Endowment who had already been severely damaged, he could definitely be killed.

The Holy Giver seemed to sense the danger, and one by one he activated the life-saving objects, and also took the holy medicine to restore his injuries.

But alas, it takes time for any elixir to recover from injuries to work.

And Ye Tian will not give it time!

"False Slash!"

Ye Tian made a move.

Wow!

The battered Saint Giver was locked by the Void Slash, and in an instant, the void he was in shattered.

And he was directly hit by the Holy Endower, and his body was shattered little by little.

This is also because the holy object on his body is not strong, not a real defensive holy object, and can only have a certain defensive effect, so there is no way to stop the false slash.

"No!"

The Holy Giver despaired.

Click!!!

The body is completely destroyed, the soul escapes, and it completely falls and dies.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the side of the Fallen Saint Grant and put away his body.

There are a lot of treasures in a holy endowment, and if nothing else, that holy relic alone is enough to make him a lot of money.

The killing of a saint-endowed person is a big deal, and it is a big deal!

Any one of the Holy Endowments is the heir of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and once the news comes out, it will lead to the Supreme Domain Ancestor!

"Black Pupil Holy Son, come and help us, or we will escape!"

One of the Holy Endowments besieging Ye Tian said.

The Black Pupil Holy Son reluctantly gave up the light-clothed Holy Maiden and killed Ye Tian.

If he didn't make a move, the other saints wouldn't be able to beat Ye Tian at all, and the difference in strength was too great.

As soon as the Black Pupil Holy Son appeared, he immediately cast a holy skill - Chaos!

This is a holy technique that directly targets the soul, once the enemy does not have a powerful soul treasure, the soul will inevitably be severely damaged, the strength will be greatly reduced, and even the soul will be directly annihilated.

But just when the Black Pupil Holy Son performed this holy skill, Ye Tian also used the holy skill of the town god.

Rumble!!!!

The two soul holy skills collided and erupted into a roar.

And the Black Pupil Holy Son's face changed, he suffered a big loss, and his soul began to shake.

In fact, his chaotic divine skill is only at the Dacheng level, and Ye Tian's Zhen Divine Skill is also a Dacheng, but the key is that Ye Tian has the Imperial Body Holy Skill, which can increase any holy skill, which is an extremely terrifying thing.

As a result, Ye Tianzhen's Divine Technique was comparable to the Divine Technique of the Consummation Realm, and the Chaotic God of the Black Pupil Holy Son was naturally not an opponent.

"Damn it, how can he have so many holy skills, and it's a different type of holy skill, this guy is so lucky, he gave birth to so many holy endowments???"

The Black Pupil Son was puzzled.

The Chaos Divine Technique was useless, so he didn't continue to use it.

Immediately, he performed another holy technique of his own, the Nine Shadows Ice Technique!

Wow!

The Nine Shadows Ice Technique instantly froze the area where Ye Tian was.

However, it was instantly shattered and torn apart by Ye Tian's Golden Silk Holy Technique.

At this moment, Ye Tian approached the Black Pupil Holy Son and performed the Void Slash Holy Technique.
